_comment: Delta JSON — single session output. User merges into master pipeline.json manually.

_rules.oppValue: String with unit suffix. INR = Lakhs e.g. '56L'. EUR = Thousands e.g. '10K'. Users = plain number e.g. '25'. null if TBD.
_rules.currentStatus: Qualification | Demo | POC | Proposal | Completed | Closed | On-Hold
_rules.targetMonth: Short month name: Jan Feb Mar Apr May Jun Jul Aug Sep Oct Nov Dec. null if unknown.
_rules.id_accounts: Format: [PARTNER_ID]-NNN — user assigns final sequential ID on merge.
_rules.accountURL: Always null in delta. User fills in master JSON.
_rules.deadline: ISO date YYYY-MM-DD. null if TBD or not stated.
